acceptanceCriteria: Each composition exists as a typed packages/ui export, built from #412's elements (no duplicated primitive logic)
Render + interaction-state tests per composition (default, hover, pressed, focus-visible, disabled, loading, error, empty — only the states that apply)
Dialogs/popovers implement focus trap, Escape dismissal, and outside-click dismissal per ux_principles.md
Tables and forms are keyboard-navigable with labelled inputs
44×44px minimum touch target and visible focus-visible state on every interactive composition
Vietnamese copy where the composition renders text
Import-boundary tests confirm these compositions are importable by apps/demo and do not import from any apps/*

resolvedDecisions.decision: Implement packages/ui surface compositions only (cards, dialogs, forms, tables, popovers); no destination screens.
Keep DestinationCard and RecommendationCard; add Standard/Interactive/surface card primitives and missing card compositions per cards.md without rewriting Home launchers.
Unblocked — #412 merged via PR #415 onto origin/main.
Run in parallel with exclusive file ownership; do not edit toast/loading/chart/nav composition files owned by #414.

inScope: packages/ui Card surface primitives (Standard/Interactive) and any missing Decision/execution card compositions per cards.md
packages/ui Dialog (modal/sheet/confirm/alert patterns as design requires)
packages/ui Form controls compositions with labelled inputs
Vitest interaction-state coverage and import-boundary tests
Compose from #412 elements; Vietnamese copy; 44px + focus-visible
outOfScope: apps/demo destination screens beyond import-boundary proof
Backend, auth, live data, deploy, apps/dashboard product changes

# Issue #413 — packages/ui surface compositions

## In scope
- Build typed packages/ui compositions: cards, dialogs, forms, tables, popovers.
- Compose from #412 elements; focus trap/Escape/outside-click for dialogs/popovers; labelled keyboard forms/tables.
- Interaction-state Vitest; 44×44 + focus-visible; Vietnamese text; import-boundary proof for apps/demo.

## Out of scope
- #414 toasts/loaders/navigation/charts; destination screens; backend/auth/deploy.

## Edge design docs
- docs/product/design/Components/dialogs.md
- docs/product/design/Components/forms.md
- docs/product/design/Components/tables.md
- docs/product/design/Components/popovers.md
- docs/product/design/Components/cards.md
